title: Source layer contract
description: Contract for vector layer identifiers, geometry, zoom coverage, and runtime-required attributes.

contract_version.title: Contract version
contract_version.description: Semantic version of the source-layer contract document.

layers.title: Layer contracts
layers.description: The complete collection of source layers promised to the runtime.

items.title: Source layer
items.description: Requirements for one stable vector-tile source layer.

layer_id.title: Layer identifier
layer_id.description: Stable source-layer identifier used by map styles and runtime queries.

description.title: Layer description
description.description: Human-readable statement of the layer's geographic meaning.

geometry_types.title: Allowed geometry types
geometry_types.description: Geometry families permitted in the source layer.

minzoom.title: Minimum zoom
minzoom.description: Lowest zoom for which the archive must contain coverage for this layer.

maxzoom.title: Maximum zoom
maxzoom.description: Highest native zoom the runtime may request for this layer.

required_attributes.title: Required attributes
required_attributes.description: Properties that every feature must expose to the runtime.

items.title: Required attribute
items.description: One normalized runtime property and its value contract.

type.title: Attribute type
type.description: JSON-compatible scalar type exposed after tile decoding.

nullable.title: Nullable
nullable.description: Whether an explicit null source value may be represented by omission in the tile.

description.title: Attribute description
description.description: Runtime purpose and semantic meaning of the property.
